nodes.title:
Is Walkable
La destinazione è Componente movimento personaggio

Is Walkable
La destinazione è Componente movimento personaggio
Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.
nodes.comment: Step 1: Trace forward to find a wall / object the character cannot walk on.

nodes.title: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.
nodes.comment: Step 2: Trace downward from the first trace's Impact Point and determine if the hit location is walkable.

nodes.title: Step 3: Check if the capsule has room to stand at the downward trace's location. If so, set that location as the Target Transform and calculate the mantle height.
nodes.comment: Step 3: Check if the capsule has room to stand at the downward trace's location. If so, set that location as the Target Transform and calculate the mantle height.

nodes.title:
Mantle Start
La destinazione è ALS Base Character BP
Step 5: If everything checks out, start the Mantle
nodes.comment: Step 5: If everything checks out, start the Mantle

nodes.title:
Get Actor Location
La destinazione è Actor
Step 4: Determine the Mantle Type by checking the movement mode and Mantle Height.
nodes.comment: Step 4: Determine the Mantle Type by checking the movement mode and Mantle Height.
